name: Annie Mae Jones' Cornmeal Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease 2 6-cup muffin tins with vegetable shortening or lard and place in the oven to heat.
3. Sift cornmeal, baking soda, and salt into a mixing bowl.
4. Beat egg with buttermilk. Heat shortening with butter until melted; add to egg and buttermilk and blend. Add to dry ingredients all at once and stir just enough to give the mixture a rough appearance. Add additional buttermilk if the mixture seems too dry.
5. Pour into hot muffin pans and bake for about 20 minutes, or until lightly browned. Serve hot with plenty of soft butter and any homemade jelly or jam.
